……我々を主体とした作戦、か。: ...An operation centered on us, is it?
ああ。<br>ライム、説明を頼む。: Yeah. Lime, I'll leave the explanation to you.
――今回の任務は前線基地部隊ではなく、<br>ミレスガルド騎士団単独での作戦です:
—This mission is not to be carried out by the Frontline Base Troops,
but solely by the Milesgard Knights.
内容は大穴上層にて新たに発見された<br>未探索領域の調査となります。:
The mission is to survey a newly discovered unexplored area in the
upper layer of the Abyss.
……危険な任務だな。<br>なぜ我々だけで遂行する必要がある？: ...A dangerous mission. Why must we be the only ones to undertake it?
それには各国の意向が関係していまして……: That has to do with the concerns of the various nations...
司令官の指揮のもと、<br>大穴探索はある程度の進捗を達成していると言えます。:
Under the Commander's leadership, the Abyss exploration has
progressed to a certain extent.
しかしその結果は、前線基地部隊の特殊な性質に依存しているのでは、<br>という懸:
However, concerns have been raised that this success might be due
to the unique capabilities of the Frontline Base Troops.
……大穴探索が可能なのは前線基地の部隊だけ、となれば<br>出資している各国から:
...So if the Abyss can only be explored by the Frontline Base Troops,
the nations providing funding would voice complaints.
さすが慧眼です！ レイゼリア様！: As expected of your keen insight, Lady Reyzeria!
そういった各国の不満を抑えるため、<br>ミレスガルド騎士団単独でおこなう必要が:
To suppress those grievances from the other nations, the Milesgard
Knights must undertake this mission alone.
概要は分かった。<br>それで……貴様は今回の作戦が成功すると思っているのか？: I understand the outline. So... do you think this mission will succeed?
……危険な挑戦であることは否定しない。<br>だからこそ、お前にしか頼めないんだ:
I won't deny it's a dangerous challenge. That's exactly why I'm
counting on you and no one else.
レイゼリアの率いるミレスガルド騎士団。<br>この任務を達成できるとしたら、お前:
The Milesgard Knights led by Reyzeria. If anyone can accomplish this
mission, it's you all.
……だが、我々を選んだのは正しい判断だ。: ...But choosing us was the correct call.
そこまで頼られて、断っては騎士失格だろう。<br>期待には応えてみせる。:
After being asked that way, refusing would make me unfit to be a
knight. I'll meet your expectations.
困難な任務であればこそ、我々の真価が見せられるというもの。<br>貴様の選んだ騎:
It's precisely because this mission is difficult that we can prove our
true worth. You'd do well to witness the strength of the knights you selected.
レイゼリアは機嫌良く笑い、<br>颯爽と司令室を出ていった。: Reyzeria laughed in good spirits and strode out of the command room.
……ふう、なんとか任務は受けてもらえたな。<br>あとはきっちりと成功してもらう:
Phew, at least we got her to accept the mission. Now we just need to
make sure it's a success.
朴念仁の八方美人の厚顔無恥……！<br>レイゼリア様にあんな笑顔を向けていただく:
A blockhead, a people-pleaser, and shameless...! I won't forgive you
for getting Lady Reyzeria to smile like that!
はあ！？ 今のは危険な任務を任せられて、<br>使命感に燃えていただけだろう！？:
*Sigh*!? That was just her being fired up by a sense of duty after
being entrusted with a dangerous mission, wasn't it!?
レイゼリア様は、あなたに任せられたからこそ、<br>あんなにも嬉しそうだったの！:
Lady Reyzeria was that happy precisely because it was you who
entrusted her with the mission!
そもそも！ わたくしの立案した作戦は<br>ここまで危険なものではなかったはずよ:
And besides, the operation I drafted shouldn't have been this
dangerous!
どうしてこんな<br>命の危険がある作戦に変わっているの！？: Why did it turn into such a life-threatening operation?
相手はあのレイゼリアだぞ？<br>活躍できるようにお膳立てされた作戦なんてすぐに:
Look, we're dealing with the one and only Reyzeria. She'd see right
through a plan that was just set up to let her shine.
……そ、そうね。<br>レイゼリア様ならば……: I-I suppose so. If it's Lady Reyzeria...
本当に危険な作戦で正しく実力を発揮してもらう<br>そのほうが成果を出すだろ？:
Getting her to truly show her strength in a genuinely dangerous
operation—that'll produce better results, right?
探索には俺も同行する。<br>レイゼリアに俺とライムがいれば、どんな任務でも成し:
I'll be accompanying the exploration too. With me, Lime, and Reyzeria,
we can accomplish any mission.
もうちょっと司令官を敬えよ、お前……: Show a little more respect for your Commander, will you...
ミレスガルド騎士団特別任務。<br>大穴探索作戦。:
The Milesgard Knights' special mission: the Abyss exploration
operation.
大穴内部へと進んだミレスガルド騎士団は、<br>レイゼリアを中心に、破竹の進軍を:
Advancing into the Abyss, the Milesgard Knights showed unstoppable
progress with Reyzeria at the center.
はああああっ！<br>モンスターども、我らの邪魔はさせないっ！: *pant*! You monsters, I won't let you stand in our way!
レイゼリア様、すげえ……！<br>モンスターが相手になってねえ！: Lady Reyzeria is amazing... The monsters don't stand a chance!
なんて美しい戦い……！<br>私たちも続きましょう！: What a magnificent battle...! Let's keep going too!
無理はするな！ <br>モンスターには常に複数名で相対しろ！: Don't overexert yourselves! Always engage monsters in groups!
レイゼリアの戦いに呼応するように、<br>ミレスガルド兵もまた、限界を超えた力を:
Echoing Reyzeria's combat, the Milesgard soldiers too were pushing
beyond their limits.
さすがはレイゼリア様……！<br>先頭に立ってモンスターを駆逐しながら、配下への:
As expected of Lady Reyzeria! She's at the forefront, driving back
the monsters while issuing flawless commands to her subordinates!
本当にすごい方！<br>レイゼリア様の副官でいられることが誇らしい……！: She's truly amazing! I'm proud to be Lady Reyzeria's adjutant...!
確かにとんでもない強さだな。<br>困難な任務だと思ったが、あいつにかかれば問題:
Yeah, she's insanely strong. I thought this would be a tough mission,
but with her on it, it looks like no problem.
レイゼリア？<br>どうした、前線はいいのか？: Reyzeria? What's up? Aren't you supposed to be leading the front?
そちらは仲間たちが抑えている。<br>その間に貴様の意見を聞いておこうと思ってな: My squad has that handled. I wanted to hear your thoughts on this.
敵の数は多いが、どれも小物だ。<br>その割には逃げる様子がなく、止まることなく:
There are many enemies, but they're all small fry. Yet they show no
sign of fleeing and keep attacking without pause.
いくら相手がモンスターとはいえ、どうも違和感がある。<br>この状況、貴様はどう:
Even for monsters, this feels off. How do you interpret this
situation?
ああ、ライムも一緒に考えてくれ。<br>予測はしているが、なるべく確度を高めたい:
Ah, Lime, think along with us. I have a guess, but I'd like to be more
certain.
おそらくだが、今戦っているモンスターは<br>背後から大物に追い立てられ、こちら:
Probably, the monsters we're fighting now are being driven toward us
from behind by a larger one.
だから小物のくせに逃げることもなく、<br>必死に襲いかかってくるわけだ。:
That's why, despite being small fry, they don't flee and keep
attacking desperately.
……私の考えと同じだな。<br>このあとに本番が控えている、と。: ...My thoughts exactly. The main event is still to come.
よし。ライム、進軍を停止だ。<br>陣形を組んで大物に備える。: Good. Lime, halt the advance. Form ranks and prepare for the Beast.
は、はい！<br>直ちに全部隊に指示を出します！: Y-yes! I'll issue orders to all units immediately!
頼んだ。<br>私は前線で、少しでも数を減らそう！: I'm counting on you. I'll head to the front and thin their numbers!
レイゼリアはその場を飛び出し、<br>またたくまに前線へ駆け戻っていった。:
Reyzeria sprang from the spot and within an instant had rushed back
to the front lines.
戦いの中でも冷静、か。<br>なるほど、上に立つものの器だな。: Collected even in battle, huh. Truly the caliber of a leader.
レイゼリア様の副官はわたくしなのに！<br>なぜわたくしではなく、あなたに相談を: I am Lady Reyzeria's adjutant! Why did she consult you instead of me?
え、ええ……？<br>そりゃ、俺のほうが大穴には詳しいから、じゃないか？: Uh, well... It's because I know the Abyss better, isn't it?
だとしても、こんな司令官改め大穴見物人なんかじゃなく、<br>副官であるわたくし:
Even so, I wish she'd consulted me first, her adjutant, not some
Commander-turned-Abyss-sightseer...!
レイゼリアに活躍してもらうため、見ているだけなのは事実だが。<br>そんなふうに:
It's true I'm just watching so Reyzeria can shine, but you don't have
to put it that way...
――そして予測通りに現れた大型モンスターは、<br>万全の準備で待ち構えるミレス:
—And as predicted, the Beast appeared and was magnificently
defeated by the Milesgard Knights, who were fully prepared and lying in wait.
総員、交代で休憩に入れ！<br>休むことも任務の内だ、疲れが残っているなどとは言:
All troops, take rest in shifts! Resting is part of the mission, so don't
claim you're still tired!
ここまで順調そのものだな。<br>この調子なら本当に任務を成功させられそうだ。: Flawless so far. At this rate, we might actually pull off the mission.
ええ、すべてはレイゼリア様のお力ね！: Yes, all thanks to Lady Reyzeria's power!
はあ……本当にレイゼリア様は素晴らしい方。<br>戦えば勝ち、民を守り、その精神:
*sigh*... Lady Reyzeria truly is wonderful. She wins every battle,
protects the people, and her spirit is without a single cloud!
なのに本国の連中は<br>どうしてレイゼリア様の邪魔をするようなことを……。:
And yet the folks back home, why do they do things that get in Lady
Reyzeria's way...
優秀だから、だろう。<br>優れているからこそ、妬み、恨み、敵対視する。:
It's because she's excellent, right? Precisely because she excels,
they envy, resent, and oppose her.
遠く離れた今しか勝てないと思っているから、<br>全力で足を引っ張るわけだ。:
They believe they can only win if they keep their distance, so they're
doing everything they can to hold us back.
なんて愚かな！ レイゼリア様と敵対するぐらいなら、<br>その下についたほうがず:
How foolish! Rather than opposing Lady Reyzeria, you would have a
far brighter future serving under her!
あの方は民のため、正義のためにしか戦わない。<br>レイゼリア様に付き従うという:
She only fights for the people and for justice. Following Lady
Reyzeria is truly a blessing.
本当に尊敬しているんだな……。<br>まさにカリスマってやつか。: You really do respect her... Now that's charisma.
しかしなあ、確かにレイゼリアはすごいが、<br>俺はライムも同じぐらいすごいと思:
Still, Reyzeria's amazing, no doubt, but I think you're just as amazing,
Lime.
なっ……わたくしがレイゼリア様に並ぶ！？<br>なんて適当なことを！:
What... Me, on par with Lady Reyzeria? Don't say such irresponsible
things!
別にお世辞で言ったわけじゃない。<br>指揮官としての本心だ。:
I'm not just flattering you. That's my sincere opinion as your
commander.
なお悪いわね！<br>人を見極める才覚は指揮官として最も重要な資質！:
That is even worse! The ability to judge character is the most
important quality for a commander!
あなたの指揮官としての能力に<br>疑問を持たざるを得ないわ！: I cannot help but doubt your ability as a commander!
ライムは厳しい表情で睨むと、<br>その手に持つ銃を構え、<user>へ銃口を向: Lime glared sternly, raised her gun, and pointed it at .
わたくしの目が曇っていたわ……！<br>あなたはレイゼリア様のそばにいるべき人で: I was blind...! You don't deserve to be by Lady Reyzeria's side!
